entry.title: OUT OF MY EXPERTATION!
entry.content: I heard about the series,NO GOOD NICK,had been cut from a chinese website.There is no more season two.I didn't doubt check this sourse at IMDB.But I find it update today.HAHA~the news sometimes get twisted through passing,especially from one language to another.It's not easy to shift our mind to dig deeper,judging so fast seems like a smartpants.But is that true? The series are about a girl,Nick,using the fake id to fraud the Thomsons to get money helping her father get out of jail.Talk later,Bye~
